title: BP makes oil discovery off US Gulf coast | Reuters
description: BP has made an oil discovery at the Far South field in the U.S. Gulf of Mexico, it said on Monday, as the energy major seeks to grow production under a strategy reset announced earlier this year.
bodyText: Reporting by Sheila Dang in Houston, additional reporting by Arunima Kumar in Bengaluru; Editing by Leslie Adler and Barbara Lewis Our Standards: The Thomson Reuters Trust Principles., opens new tab
